home.tagline: Autonomous oversight of Brazilian municipal spending
home.subtitle: Every alert cites its source. Every source is the official gazette.
home.cta_alertas: See alerts from Caxias do Sul
home.step_collect_desc: Daily monitoring of Brazilian municipal official gazettes via Querido Diário (OKFN Brazil).
home.step_analyze_desc: Fiscal agents cross-reference company IDs (CNPJs), procurement records, federal sanctions, and contract history.
home.step_alert_desc: Automatic publication of findings with risk score ≥ 60 and confidence ≥ 0.70, always with legal basis cited.
home.section_ecosystem: Standing on the shoulders of giants
home.ecosystem_desc: Fiscal Digital extends — not competes with — the foundational Brazilian civic innovation projects.
home.support_desc: Fiscal Digital is maintained by community contributions. Every inflow and outflow is publicly reported.

footer.tagline: Autonomous oversight of Brazilian municipal public spending.
footer.ombros: Standing on the shoulders of Serenata de Amor and Querido Diário (OKFN Brazil)

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.description: The address you accessed does not exist or has moved. You can still browse published alerts or return to the home page.

alertas.title: Public Spending Alerts
alertas.subtitle: Findings automatically published by Fiscal agents. Every alert cites its official gazette source.
alertas.empty_desc: Try adjusting the filters or check back later.

rss.title: Subscribe via RSS
rss.description: Receive alerts directly in your RSS reader
rss.compatible: Compatible with any RSS reader (Feedly, NewsBlur, etc.)

meta.home_title: Fiscal Digital — Autonomous oversight of Brazilian municipal spending
meta.home_description: Autonomous agents read Brazilian municipal official gazettes and publish verifiable alerts. Every finding cites its source. MIT and CC-BY 4.0.
meta.alertas_description: Findings published automatically by Fiscal agents. Risk score >= 60 and confidence >= 0.70. Always with cited source.
meta.manifesto_description: Why municipal oversight is the most urgent civic work. Principles, method, limits and commitments of Fiscal Digital.
meta.sobre_description: Who is behind Fiscal Digital, the team, partners and our roots in Serenata de Amor and Querido Diário.
meta.transparencia_description: Every dollar in and every dollar out, in public. Operating costs, donations and financial reports of the project.
meta.apoie_description: Support Fiscal Digital on Catarse. Recurring, transparent, with no governmental or partisan funding.
meta.cidades_description: Brazilian municipalities monitored by Fiscal Digital. Caxias do Sul live; expanding to 50 cities.
meta.cidade_description: Alerts, suppliers and public contracts of {cidade} extracted from the official gazette. Updated daily.
meta.alerta_description: Detail of the finding in {cidade}, with legal basis, evidence and link to the original Querido Diário gazette.
meta.comparacoes_description: Compare spending, suppliers and risk patterns across Brazilian municipalities monitored by Fiscal Digital.
